meta.title: Astro Awards: Celebrating The Best Missions Of 2025?
meta.description:
Welcome to the Astro Awards, celebrating the most inspirational, innovative and important missions of 2025! Your congratulations might even make it on air, so be sure and let us know if a particular mission inspired you or was of specific significance to you.

Thank You to Our 2026 Sponsors:
Firefly Aerospace: https://fireflyspace.com/
Poggipolini: https://poggipolini.it/en/aerospace.html
Reflect Orbital: https://www.reflectorbital.com/
Boom Supersonic: https://boomsupersonic.com/
Astrolab: https://www.astrolab.space/
Stoke Space: https://www.stokespace.com/
SpaceX: https://www.spacex.com/
Guinn Partners: https://www.guinnpartners.com/
Voyager: https://voyagertechnologies.com/
Foley & Lardner LLP: https://www.foley.com/
Iceland Eclipse: https://icelandeclipse.com/
SWIFT: https://www.swiftrocket.org/
Float Globe: https://floatglobe.com/
Planex: https://planex.space/
Starbase Brewing: https://starbasebrewery.com/
No Coast: http://www.nocoast.space/

--------------------------

Want to support what I do? Consider becoming a Patreon supporter for access to exclusive livestreams, our discord channel! - http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Or become a YouTube member for some bonus perks as well! - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6uKrU_WqJ1R2HMTY3LIx5Q/join

The best place for all your space merch needs!
https://everydayastronaut.com/shop/

All music is original! You can find my music anywhere you listen to music (Spotify, iTunes, Google Play, Amazon, etc) under "Everyday Astronaut"
